nasb.text: Therefore You delivered them into the hand of their oppressors who oppressed them, But when they cried to You in the time of their distress, You heard from heaven, and according to Your great compassion You gave them deliverers who delivered them from the hand of their oppressors.

esv.text: Therefore you gave them into the hand of their enemies, who made them suffer. And in the time of their suffering they cried out to you and you heard them from heaven, and according to your great mercies you gave them saviors who saved them from the hand of their enemies.

cnv.text: 所以你把他們交在敵人的手中，好讓他們受困苦； 他們受困苦的時候，就向你呼求， 你就從天上垂聽，按著你豐盛的憐憫， 賜給他們拯救者，拯救他們脫離敵人的手。

ccb.text: 于是你把他们交在欺压他们的仇敌手中。他们在患难中向你呼求，你就从天上垂听，怀着丰盛的怜悯赐给他们拯救者，把他们从仇敌手中拯救出来。
